entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A type of chickpea (Cicer arietinum) traditionally not grown in Maharashtra due to late maturity and susceptibility to fusarium wilt

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where kabuli chickpeas were introduced and cultivated

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research and cultivation of chickpeas take place

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach maturity, with earliness being a desired characteristic

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease to which traditional kabuli chickpeas were susceptible

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: The characteristic of maturing early, introgressed from desi types

entities.name: WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability to resist fusarium wilt, introgressed from desi types

entities.name: DESI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A type of chickpea used as a source for earliness and wilt resistance traits

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC BREEDING
entities.description: The process used to introgress desired traits from desi types into kabuli genotypes

entities.name: ICCV 2
entities.description: An early-maturing kabuli chickpea genotype released for cultivation in India

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where ICCV 2 was first released in 1989

entities.name: CENTRAL VARIETY RELEASE COMMITTEE
entities.description: The body responsible for notifying the release of the ICCV 2 variety

entities.name: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA
entities.description: The national government overseeing the Central Variety Release Committee

entities.name: MARKET PRICE
entities.description: The economic value of the chickpea variety in the Indian market

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the seeds, which influences the market price

entities.name: BOLD KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: Kabuli chickpeas characterized by larger seeds and higher market value

entities.name: 100-SEED MASS
entities.description: A measurement of seed weight, where more than 40g defines bold types
